description: Android SDK for Termux by mumumusuc. Includes build-tools 35, platform-tools, NDK 27 and CMake. All bundled in the .deb — no sdkmanager downloads required.

install_steps.command: dpkg -i $DOWNLOAD_PATH 2>&1; apt-get install -f -y 2>&1; dpkg -l android-sdk 2>&1 | grep -q '^ii' || (echo 'ERROR: android-sdk package not installed' && exit 1)
install_steps.description: Installing Android SDK .deb (includes build-tools 35, NDK, CMake)

install_steps.command: grep -qxF 'export ANDROID_HOME="$PREFIX/opt/android-sdk"' $HOME/.bashrc || echo 'export ANDROID_HOME="$PREFIX/opt/android-sdk"' >> $HOME/.bashrc && grep -qxF 'export ANDROID_NDK_HOME="$PREFIX/opt/android-ndk"' $HOME/.bashrc || echo 'export ANDROID_NDK_HOME="$PREFIX/opt/android-ndk"' >> $HOME/.bashrc && grep -qxF 'export PATH="$PATH:$ANDROID_HOME/cmdline-tools/latest/bin:$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools"' $HOME/.bashrc || echo 'export PATH="$PATH:$ANDROID_HOME/cmdline-tools/latest/bin:$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools"' >> $HOME/.bashrc
install_steps.description: Adding ANDROID_HOME, ANDROID_NDK_HOME and PATH to .bashrc

install_steps.command: SDKMANAGER="$ANDROID_HOME/cmdline-tools/latest/bin/sdkmanager" && test -f "$SDKMANAGER" || (echo "ERROR: sdkmanager not found at $SDKMANAGER" && exit 1) && ln -sf "$SDKMANAGER" "$PREFIX/bin/sdkmanager" && echo 'sdkmanager symlink created'

config_steps.description: Installing Gradle (used by gradlew shim in new projects)

config_steps.command: test -d "$ANDROID_HOME/build-tools/35.0.0" && echo 'build-tools/35.0.0 OK' || echo 'WARNING: build-tools/35.0.0 not found, check $ANDROID_HOME' && test -d "$PREFIX/opt/android-ndk" && echo 'NDK OK' || echo 'WARNING: NDK not found'
config_steps.description: Verifying build-tools and NDK are present

config_steps.command: (set -e; JDTLS_DIR=$PREFIX/opt/jdtls; mkdir -p $JDTLS_DIR; echo '=== Downloading Eclipse JDT Language Server ==='; JDTLS_URL=$(wget -qO- https://api.github.com/repos/eclipse-jdtls/eclipse.jdt.ls/releases/latest 2>/dev/null | grep -o 'https://[^"]*tar.gz' | grep jdt-language-server | head -1); if [ -z "$JDTLS_URL" ]; then echo 'ERROR: Cannot find jdtls download URL'; exit 1; fi; echo "Downloading $JDTLS_URL"; wget -q "$JDTLS_URL" -O $TMPDIR/jdtls.tar.gz 2>&1; echo 'Extracting...'; tar xzf $TMPDIR/jdtls.tar.gz -C $JDTLS_DIR 2>&1; rm -f $TMPDIR/jdtls.tar.gz; echo "jdtls installed at $JDTLS_DIR"; ls $JDTLS_DIR/) 2>&1 && echo 'OK: Java LSP (jdtls) installed' || echo 'WARNING: Java LSP install failed - Java files will have no LSP support'
config_steps.description: Installing Eclipse JDT Language Server (Java LSP)

config_steps.command: (set -e; KLS_VER=1.3.13; KLS_DIR=$PREFIX/opt/kotlin-language-server; mkdir -p $KLS_DIR; echo '=== Downloading Kotlin Language Server ==='; wget -q https://github.com/fwcd/kotlin-language-server/releases/download/$KLS_VER/server.zip -O $TMPDIR/kls.zip 2>&1; echo 'Extracting...'; unzip -o $TMPDIR/kls.zip -d $KLS_DIR 2>&1; rm -f $TMPDIR/kls.zip; chmod +x $KLS_DIR/server/bin/kotlin-language-server; ln -sf $KLS_DIR/server/bin/kotlin-language-server $PREFIX/bin/kotlin-language-server; echo "kotlin-language-server $KLS_VER installed") 2>&1 && echo 'OK: Kotlin LSP installed' || echo 'WARNING: Kotlin LSP install failed - Kotlin files will have no LSP support'

uninstall_steps.description: Removing Android SDK and NDK directories
Removing Java LSP (jdtls) and Kotlin Language Server
